task_completion.description: Divide the space into five named zones: Assembly Line, Warehouse Storage, Management Office, Employee Breakroom, and Quality Control (QC) Lab.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 2D floor plan in Sweet Home 3D. There should be five distinct areas or rooms created, ideally with visible room names corresponding to Assembly Line, Warehouse Storage, Management Office, Employee Breakroom, and QC Lab.

task_completion.description: Enclose the Office, Breakroom, and QC Lab with partition walls and doors, leaving the Assembly and Warehouse areas open.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 2D or 3D view, verify that the Management Office, Employee Breakroom, and QC Lab are fully surrounded by walls and have doors for entry. The Assembly Line and Warehouse Storage areas should not be fully enclosed by walls.

task_completion.description: Furnish the Assembly area with at least six workbenches and six stools.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Count the furniture in the Assembly Line zone. There must be at least 6 workbenches (or similar tables) and at least 6 stools (or similar seating) visible in the 2D plan or 3D view.

task_completion.description: Furnish the Warehouse with eight industrial shelving units.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Count the furniture in the Warehouse Storage zone. There must be at least 8 shelving units or storage racks visible.

task_completion.description: Furnish the Breakroom with a dining table, four chairs, a sink, and two kitchen appliances.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Inspect the Employee Breakroom zone. Look for 1 dining table, at least 4 chairs around it, 1 sink unit, and at least 2 kitchen appliances (e.g., refrigerator, microwave, coffee maker).

task_completion.description: Furnish the Office and QC Lab with at least three desks, three office chairs, and two computers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Inspect the Management Office and QC Lab zones. Across these two rooms, there must be a combined total of at least 3 desks, 3 office chairs, and 2 computers (laptops or desktops).

task_completion.description: Annotate the layout with at least three text labels for specific stations.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 2D floor plan for free-floating text labels added by the user (e.g., 'Station 1', 'Packaging', 'Assembly Point'). There must be at least 3 distinct text annotations.

integrity.description: Agent used the Sweet Home 3D GUI to design the layout.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Sweet Home 3D application window open with the layout actively being built, rather than just a terminal window or text editor.

integrity.description: Agent sourced items from the built-in Sweet Home 3D catalog.
integrity.visual_evidence: The furniture list panel on the left side of the Sweet Home 3D interface should show standard catalog items being dragged into the plan.

integrity.description: Agent saved the completed project to /home/ga/Documents/facility_layout.sh3d.
integrity.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog box or the main window title bar should indicate the file is named 'facility_layout.sh3d' and saved in the Documents directory.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires a total of 100 points with a passing threshold of 70. The agent starts with 'industrial_shell_starter.sh3d'. The layout must include 5 specific zones (Assembly Line, Warehouse Storage, Management Office, Employee Breakroom, QC Lab). Office, Breakroom, and QC Lab must be enclosed with walls and doors. Assembly and Warehouse must be open. Specific furniture counts apply: Assembly (6+ workbenches, 6+ stools), Warehouse (8+ shelving units), Breakroom (1 table, 4 chairs, 1 sink, 2+ appliances), Office/QC Lab combined (3+ desks, 3+ office chairs, 2+ computers). At least 3 text annotations are required.
